caption: A man is seated in a studio setting, wearing a white button-down shirt, tan suspenders, a red bow tie, and a tall, grey, stylized wig. He wears large black headphones and sits behind a professional microphone. The background consists of a wall decorated with several framed photographs and clothing items, including a black vest on a mannequin and a garment with "LEE" visible on the label. On-screen graphics include a logo on the left that reads "BOSS TALK JOY PODCAST" and a similar logo on the right that reads "BOSS TALK JOY". Across the sequence, the man's head movements are minimal; he begins by looking slightly to the left with his mouth open as if speaking, then shifts his gaze slightly downward and to the side, appearing to listen or pause in his speech.
